passed_checks.check_name: Ensure the base image uses a non latest version tag
Ensure From Alias are unique for multistage builds.

passed_checks.check_name: Ensure update instructions are not use alone in the Dockerfile
code_block:
FROM node:lts-alpine
WORKDIR /app
COPY package.json package-lock.json* ./
RUN npm ci --omit=dev || npm install --omit=dev
COPY app.js ./
USER node
EXPOSE 3001
CMD ["npm", "start"]
